title: [Moore] Fix the stacking fault caused by cast and remove unused headers

features.name: moore_read_on_net_wire
features.description: Code should include a moore.read operation applied to a moore.net (wire) result

features.name: always_procedure_with_posedge_wait
features.description: Code should include a moore.procedure always block with moore.wait_event posedge on a read net

features.name: moore_conversion_l1_to_i1
features.description: Code should include a moore.conversion operation casting !moore.l1 type to i1

features.name: conditional_nonblocking_assign_to_variable
features.description: Code should include a moore.nonblocking_assign to a variable inside an scf.if conditional
